name: Peanut Butter-Orange Sandwich Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly mix peanut butter, honey, and salt.
2. Stir in oranges.
3. Chill.
Use about 1/3 cup filling per sandwich.
Filling can be made the day before using. Store tightly covered in the refrigerator. Stir lightly before making sandwiches.
Calories per serving: About 285 for filling; 420 for a sandwich made with 2 slices of bread.
